title: Valkerien Item Transfer
description: allows the player to transfer items between ships and between ships and the ground
body:
allows the player to transfer items between ships and between ships and the ground. adds in a ship Item Transporter block which is used to make a multiblock structure that chests can connect to so the player can automatically transfer items between the ship and the ground or between 2 ships 
basic instructions to use the mod:
step 1: place down item transport blocks next to each other
step 2:place down chests or a chest next to the multiblock
step 3: have another multiblock on a ship within a block of the other multiblock
step 4: make sure one multiblock is set export and the other import
step 5: place items in the chest and watch it transfer
